text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer, born into the prestigious Mejiro
family, wants to run away from their expectations
and live life on her own terms, but she believes it
will be difficult.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then one day, she decides to run in a freestyle
race. The spectators enjoy her explosive runaway
style, and she learns the joy of running free.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She finds a bestie in Daitaku Helios, who is also
good at making explosive breakaway dashes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer decides to throw away everything
holding her back and run like each race is a party.
As the new party girl of the Mejiro family, she's
aiming for the top!
